message:
refactor(mux): extract logToFile, collectPanels, computeCursorPixelCoords, buildInspectorStateBuf helpers

Deduplicate render loop boilerplate:
- logToFile replaces 8 identical debug-log and 3 perf-log blocks
- collectPanels replaces manual mutex+iterate pattern
- computeCursorPixelCoords shared between sendCursorStateToConn and render loop
- buildInspectorStateBuf shared between send-to-panel and broadcast-to-all
